headline: Erste Group Downgrades Verizon (VZ) to Hold on Weak Earnings Growth Outlook
summary: With a YTD Return of 17.08% as of May 7, Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is included among the 10 Best Stocks to Buy to Beat the S&P 500.
